description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a rectangular, metallic head featuring engraved markings on its side. The head is robust and blocky, with a slightly layered design and a muted gray finish, suggesting it is made of steel or iron. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood, stained a dark brown, and capped with a metallic end for reinforcement. The transition between the head and handle is reinforced with a metal collar, adding durability and strength. The hammer's overall design is utilitarian, built for delivering powerful blows, likely for demolition or heavy construction tasks. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments, giving it a clean and well-maintained appearance.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a rectangular metal head and a long, dark wooden handle, reinforced with metal at both ends. The head features engraved markings and a robust, layered design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved markings on the metallic head and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular cross-section of the handle and the square face of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the hammer, showing the other face of the head and the handle's attachment.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the broad, flat surface of the hammer head and the alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, cylindrical, dark-stained, smooth with a metallic cap at the end for reinforcement.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head, blocky and robust, with flat striking faces and engraved markings on the side.
